bingo.card.no_cards: There are no Bingo Cards to display...
bingo.card.title: Bingo Card
bingo.command.autotier.generating: Scoring uncategorized modded objectives, this may take a moment...
bingo.command.autotier.no_permission: You need operator permission to use auto-tiering.
bingo.command.card.seed.get: The current Bingo Card seed is: %s
bingo.command.card.seed.set: Changed the Bingo Card seed to %s
bingo.command.card_toggle.disabled: Disabled board '%s'. It is now hidden from board selection.
bingo.command.card_toggle.enabled: Enabled board '%s'. It can be selected again.
bingo.command.card_toggle.no_permission: You need operator permission to manage boards.
bingo.command.filter.includes_unobtainab: This filter could include unobtainable items! You might want this instead:
bingo.command.join.already_on_team: The player is already on team %s!
bingo.command.lobby.must_run: Error: You must run '%s' before this command.
bingo.command.lobby.warning1: Bingo is currently running in survival mode - which will not overwrite your world save.
bingo.command.lobby.warning2: However, turning on 'lobby mode' will DELETE YOUR WORLD FOLDER after each game to start from a fresh seed.
bingo.command.lobby.warning3: There is no way to recover lost data if you enable this setting. Are you sure you want to continue?
bingo.command.lobby.warning4: (run '%s' if you understand this and would like to proceed)
bingo.command.ready.not_on_a_team: You cannot ready up without joining a team! (use '%s' if you want to spectate)
bingo.command.ready.not_running: Cannot ready up - other players need to join a team!
bingo.command.start.already_started: The game has already been started!
bingo.command.start.data_recommends.num_: Datapack objective %s requires %s players. (use '%s' to ignore)
Datapack objective %s requires %s teams. (use '%s' to ignore)
bingo.command.start.data_recommends.play: Datapack objective %s requires %s players per team. (use '%s' to ignore)
bingo.command.start.invalid_distribution: Item distribution must add up to 25!
bingo.command.start.join_a_team_message: Use the '%s' command or click on a team to join!
bingo.command.start.lockout_with_lines_g: Lockout is enabled, but the card goal is '%s' - this might cause a stalemate. You may want this instead:
bingo.command.start.players_missing_team: Some players have not picked a team! (%s)
Run '%s' to assign teams. Use '%s' or sneak+click to ignore.
bingo.command.start.will_immediately_end: The goal is set to %s, but the card already has %s completed!
bingo.command.stats.reset.all: All high scores (best time, max win streak) on this server have been cleared.
bingo.command.stats.reset.game: High scores (best time) for the current game configuration have been cleared.
bingo.command.stats.reset.player: High scores (max win streak) for player %s have been cleared.
bingo.config.card_alignment.description: This changes which side of the screen the Bingo Card should be aligned with.
bingo.config.card_offset_x.description: This sets the horizontal distance between the Bingo Card and the edge of the screen.
bingo.config.card_offset_y.description: This sets the vertical distance between the Bingo Card and the edge of the screen.
bingo.config.card_overlap.description: Controls whether HUD elements can overlap the card, or if the card draws over everything else.
bingo.config.card_pauses_game.descriptio: Pauses the game while the card is open in single-player.
bingo.config.card_scale.description: This changes size of the Bingo Card on the screen, relative to other GUI elements.
bingo.config.card_position.description: Edit the position of the Bingo Card on the screen.
bingo.config.card_position.help_move: Left click and drag the center of the card to move it around the screen.
bingo.config.card_position.help_resize: Click and drag near the bottom right of the card to resize it.
bingo.config.enable_client_hud.descripti: Whether the client-side Bingo Card HUD is rendered.
bingo.config.gui.tooltip: Settings for the Bingo Card GUI and other visual aspects.
bingo.config.hide_on_chat.description: Hides the Bingo Card overlay when the chat screen is open.
bingo.config.hide_on_f3.description: Hides the Bingo Card overlay when the F3/Debug screen is open.
bingo.config.needs_restart: You will need to restart Minecraft for this setting to take effect.
bingo.config.quick_start_button.descript: Adds a 'Bingo!' button to the title screen that allows you to quickly start a single-player game.
Without this, you can create a Bingo game by adding the built-in 'bingo.zip' data pack in the Create World menu.
bingo.config.show_multiple_cards.descrip: Attempts to draw all available cards in the HUD, if there is space. This may overlap with other GUI elements.
bingo.config.show_team_outlines.descript: Draws a border around the card tile when other teams have captured the item.
exbingo.configuration.title: %s Configuration
exbingo.configuration.common.cards.disab: Board preset ids hidden from board selection.
exbingo.configuration.common.cards.item_: Board preset definitions written as preset_id=filter expression.
exbingo.configuration.common.cards.diffi: Card difficulty distributions written as preset_id=s,a,b,c,d. The five counts must add up to 25.
exbingo.configuration.common.cards.preve: Adds bingo_ignore to spawn kit items so they cannot score card tiles.
exbingo.configuration.common.cards.exclu: Removes active spawn kit items from generated cards.
Keeps uncategorized non-vanilla objectives off cards unless a filter selects them explicitly.
Keeps objectives for unbreakable placed blocks off cards.
exbingo.configuration.common.auto_tier.t: Automatic tiering defaults for uncategorized modded objectives.
Tier list file name written by /bingo autotier generate.
exbingo.configuration.common.auto_tier.m: Controls how auto-tier scores are converted to S/A/B/C/D tiers.
exbingo.configuration.common.auto_tier.t: Absolute score cutoffs for S, A, B, C, and D when mapping is Threshold.
exbingo.configuration.common.auto_tier.r: Score added for each recipe step while auto-tiering.
exbingo.configuration.common.lobby.preve: Stops lobby sounds from being sent to other players.
exbingo.configuration.common.lobby.lobby: Gives players a tutorial/settings book when they join the lobby.
exbingo.configuration.common.lobby.give_: Gives players a memento card after a survival-mode game ends.
exbingo.configuration.common.lobby.night: Grants night vision while spectating when player settings allow it.
Grants night vision after a game ends when player settings allow it.
exbingo.configuration.common.lobby.revea: Shows the whole vanilla advancement tree from the start.
exbingo.configuration.common.lobby.suppo: Allows connecting clients to use the Bingo HUD instead of only map/card behavior.
exbingo.configuration.common.flow.toolti: Ready timers, countdowns, and reset behavior.
exbingo.configuration.common.flow.start_: Seconds before the game starts automatically. Set to -1 to disable this timer.
Prevents the ready timer from starting until teams are available.
Prevents the ready timer from starting until someone votes ready.
exbingo.configuration.common.flow.next_r: Seconds before the next round starts automatically. Set to -1 to disable this timer.
Prevents the next-round ready timer from starting until someone votes ready.
exbingo.configuration.common.flow.countd: Ticks to wait before the start countdown begins.
exbingo.configuration.common.flow.next_r: Starts the next round or reset flow after all players disconnect in postgame.
exbingo.configuration.common.flow.unsafe: Skips part of world close during reset. This is faster but can risk bugs or data corruption.
exbingo.configuration.common.chat.toolti: Team chat and command alias defaults.
exbingo.configuration.common.chat.defaul: New players use team chat by default when they are on a team.
Spectators use spectator chat by default.
exbingo.configuration.common.chat.global: Command aliases that send messages to global chat.
exbingo.configuration.common.chat.team_c: Command aliases that send messages to team chat.
exbingo.configuration.common.stats.datab: Optional JDBC database URL. Leave blank to use the bundled SQLite database.
Optional database password. This is stored as plain text in the config file.
exbingo.configuration.common.stats.sync_: Syncs Bingo statistics with compatible servers and clients.
exbingo.configuration.common.stats.stats: Unique host id used to distinguish locally played games from synced server games.
exbingo.configuration.common.server.is_l: Enables lobby mode. In lobby mode ExBingo can delete and recreate world data after games.
exbingo.configuration.common.server.prel: Chunk view distance used while preloading team spawn areas.
exbingo.configuration.common.server.file: World-save paths or globs removed when ExBingo resets the world.
exbingo.configuration.common.default_pla: Default Player Settings
Defaults for newly created per-player settings.
Seen Tutorial
Default value for whether a player has seen the intro tutorial.
Hide Lobby Prompt
Default value for hiding the lobby prompt.
Bossbar
Default value for showing game information in a bossbar.
Scoreboard
Default value for showing game information in a scoreboard.
Scoreboard Auto Hide
Default value for hiding the scoreboard when the player is not holding a Bingo card.
Leading Messages
Default value for floating messages when the leading team changes.
Score Messages
Default value for floating messages when lines or cards are scored.
Item Messages
Default value for floating messages when items are scored.
Night Vision
Default value for opt-in night vision.
exbingo.configuration.client.hud.enable_: Renders the client-side Bingo card HUD.
exbingo.configuration.client.hud.show_qu: Adds a Bingo button to the title screen for quick single-player setup.
exbingo.configuration.client.hud.card_pa: Pauses single-player while the Bingo card screen is open.
exbingo.configuration.client.hud.card_sc: Bingo card HUD scale relative to other GUI elements.
exbingo.configuration.client.hud.card_al: Screen corner used to anchor the Bingo card HUD.
exbingo.configuration.client.hud.card_of: Horizontal distance between the Bingo card and its anchored screen edge.
Vertical distance between the Bingo card and its anchored screen edge.
exbingo.configuration.client.hud.card_ov: Controls whether the card draws above or underneath other HUD elements.
exbingo.configuration.client.hud.card_te: Draws outlines when other teams have captured a card tile.
exbingo.configuration.client.hud.show_mu: Attempts to draw all available cards in the HUD when space allows.
exbingo.configuration.client.hud.hide_on: Hides the Bingo card HUD while the debug screen is open.
Hides the Bingo card HUD while the chat screen is open.
exbingo.configuration.client.messages.me: Shows item capture messages from other teams.
Seconds each floating message remains visible.
Floating message scale relative to other GUI elements.
exbingo.configuration.client.sounds.soun: Per-sound volume overrides written as sound_id=volume.
bingo.game.message.leading_tied_with_sco: %s is tied in the lead with %s!
bingo.game.not_ending_complete: You've finished the game! Wait for other teams to complete their cards...
bingo.game.not_ending_complete_operator: (End Game is set to '%s'. Use '%s' if you're ready to end the game.)
bingo.game.not_ending_stalemate_new_card: It looks like you've reached a stalemate. The game will continue on a new card because '%s' is turned off.
bingo.installed.never_show_again.message: Okay, you won't see this message again.
bingo.installed.survival_mode_1: ExBingo is running in a very limited survival-friendly/SMP mode.
bingo.installed.survival_mode_2: To enable the full functionality, you must opt into Lobby Mode. This will automatically start a new world after each game.
bingo.installed.start_a_game_server: Use '%s' to set up Lobby Mode, or '%s' to start a game here.
bingo.installed.start_a_game_singleplaye: Use the "Bingo" button on the title screen to create a singleplayer lobby, or type '%s' to start a game here.
bingo.intro.change_player_settings: Change your player settings on the next page.
bingo.intro.autotier_intro: Modded items and advancements join the card automatically once they have a difficulty tier. Uncategorized modded content is kept off the card by default.
bingo.intro.autotier_command: Ops can run %s to auto-classify uncategorized modded content by how hard it is to obtain.
bingo.intro.autotier_note: It never changes vanilla content, mod-provided tiers, or anything already assigned.
bingo.intro.carddisable: Ops can hide a board from selection with %s (and bring it back with /bingo cardenable). Hidden boards never appear in the board list or in any "select all".
bingo.intro.carddisable_intro: Each board is a filter preset (e.g. Items, Farmer's Delight, Twilight Forest). You can turn off boards you don't want to play.
bingo.intro.carddisable_note: Disabled boards are saved server-side and apply immediately, no reload needed.
bingo.intro.keybind_hud: Press [%s] to see the Bingo Card in an inventory view.
bingo.intro.keybind_map: When holding a Bingo Card, press [%s] to see its items.
bingo.intro.port_note: ExBingo is a ported and modified version of %s, with extra features and tweaks on top of the original.
bingo.intro.use_config_commands: Use the '/bingo' command to configure the game.
bingo.intro.use_config_menu: Use the menu in front of you to configure the game.
bingo.intro.use_coords: Use "/coords" to keep track of coordinates and share them with your team.
bingo.lobby.leaving_in_run_command: Leaving in %s - type /ready to speed up!
bingo.lobby.sounds_muted: Certain sounds in this lobby may be muted to avoid spam.
bingo.lobby.starting_in_run_command: Starting in %s - type /ready to speed up!
bingo.lobby.team_spectators: ➾ You have been moved to spectators
bingo.objective.challenge.never_killed_b: Never get Killed by a Creeper
Never get Killed by a Skeleton
Never get Killed by a Zombie
bingo.options.allow_pvp.tooltip: Whether players can deal damage to each other.
bingo.options.card_difficulty.tooltip: Changes the difficulty of items that can appear on the card.
bingo.options.completed_items.tooltip: Shows the number of items completed by the leading team in the scoreboard.
bingo.options.completed_lines.tooltip: Shows the number of lines completed by the leading team in the scoreboard.
bingo.options.elytra.tooltip: Equips players with an unbreakable Elytra and unlimited rockets.
bingo.options.end_when.all_win.tooltip: Ends the game once every team has completed their card(s).
bingo.options.end_when.first_win.tooltip: Ends the game as soon as a team is declared the winner.
bingo.options.end_when.never.tooltip: Continues the game indefinitely, until the game is manually stopped.
bingo.options.end_when.num_teams_win.too: Ends the game once a certain number of teams have completed their card(s).
bingo.options.filter.tooltip: Selects the types of items that can appear on the card.
bingo.options.leading_team.tooltip: Shows the name of the leading team in the scoreboard.
bingo.options.mode_consume_items.tooltip: When an item is captured, it will vanish from your inventory.
bingo.options.mode_hidden_items.tooltip: Items are not shown on the bingo card until a player discovers them.
bingo.options.mode_inventory.tooltip: Items must remain in a team member's inventory to hold a tile.
bingo.options.mode_lockout.tooltip: Once an item is captured, that tile is locked and no other teams can collect it.
bingo.options.night_vis.tooltip: Grants the Night Vision effect to all players.
bingo.options.night_vis.tooltip_2: This can be individually toggled with '%s'.
bingo.options.preview_card.tooltip: Shows the generated card while in the lobby, before the game has started.
bingo.options.remaining_time.tooltip: Shows the remaining time in the bossbar/scoreboard, if a time limit is set.
bingo.options.show_hidden_tiers.tooltip: In 'Hidden Items' mode, the tier of each item will be shown on the card.
bingo.options.spawn_distance.tooltip: This sets the minimum distance that teams will spawn from each other.
bingo.options.spawn_kit_edit.tooltip: Edit the items in the spawn kit by placing them in this inventory.
bingo.options.spawn_kit_player.tooltip: If enabled, items are given to each player when they spawn/respawn.
bingo.options.spawn_kit_team.tooltip: If enabled, a chest is created near each team's spawnpoint.
bingo.options.unlock_recipes.tooltip: Makes all crafting recipes available in the recipe book.
bingo.options.win_behavior.stalemate.do_: Even if the goal is unreachable, the game will continue until it is manually stopped.
bingo.options.win_behavior.stalemate.end: If no team can reach the goal with the current card, then the game will end.
bingo.options.win_behavior.stalemate.rer: If no team can reach the goal with the current card, then the entire card will be replaced.
bingo.options.win_condition.infinite.too: If checked, the game will continue to generate new cards indefinitely, until the time limit.
bingo.options.win_condition.num_cards.to: The game will play the selected number of cards in sequence.
bingo.options.win_condition.replace_goal: Once an item/line is scored, it is immediately replaced with new items. Scores will accumulate until the goal is reached.
bingo.player_settings.bossbar.descriptio: Shows the time remaining in a bossbar.
How long each message should remain visible on the screen, in seconds.
bingo.player_settings.messages.items.des: Shows a message when any item is scored.
bingo.player_settings.messages.leading.d: Shows a message when the leading team is changed.
bingo.player_settings.messages.lines.des: Shows a message when a line is scored.
bingo.player_settings.messages.scale.des: This changes the size of floating messages on the screen, relative to other GUI elements.
bingo.player_settings.messages.show_othe: Includes item captures from other teams when enabled.
bingo.player_settings.night_vision.descr: Receive night vision when the feature is enabled, spectating, or post-game.
bingo.player_settings.scoreboard.descrip: Shows game info and time remaining in a scoreboard.
bingo.player_settings.scoreboard_auto_hi: Hides the scoreboard when you aren't holding the bingo card.
bingo.player_settings.tooltip: In-game behavior that can be adjusted per-player.
bingo.scoreboard.name: Minecraft Bingo
bingo.sound_settings.category_descriptio: Note: All sounds are played under the "Jukebox/Note Blocks" category, which can be adjusted in the "Music & Sounds" menu.
bingo.sound_settings.tooltip: Settings for in-game sound effects and notifications.
bingo.stats_settings.sync.description: Communicates your BINGO statistics (time played, items captured, games won, etc.) with any compatible servers that you connect to.
bingo.stats_settings.tooltip: Storage of game history and statistics.
bingo.team.name: %s Team
bingo.tier.a.tooltip: Items with high difficulty, such as rarer biomes/structures and time-consuming tasks (beekeeping).
bingo.tier.b.tooltip: Involves moderate preparation or finding a specific biome/structure to obtain.
bingo.tier.c.tooltip: Items that might take some preparation, but are generally available without much exploring.
bingo.tier.d.tooltip: Items that you can immediately pick up in the world, with little exploring or preparation.
bingo.tier.s.tooltip: For many of these items, you need to literally finish the game and then some. You have been warned.
